ROOM 611 JUDGE VON BEROLDINGEN, CGALLAGHER, CSR, GGOROSIN, CLERK. JURY TRIAL CONT'D, ALL PARTIES, BOTH COUNSEL PRESENT AS WELL AS THE 12 JURORS AND 2 ALTERNATES. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY ON THE LAW OF THE CASE. BAILIFF CARL OLSEN SWORN TO TAKE OF THE JURY, JURY RETIRED TO DELIBERATE ON ITS VERDICT. JURY HAS REACHED A VERDICT FOR THE PLTF AGAINST DEFT. IN THE AMOUNT OF $14,418.35, NO ADDITIONAL INTEREST. VERDICT READ INTO THE RECORD, JURY DISCHARGED, THANKED AND EXCUSED, REMAINDER OF JURY DUTY ORDERED EXCUSED BY COURT. EXHIBITS IN EVIDENCE RETAINED BY COURT AT THE REQUEST OF DEFT'S COUNSEL. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

REMITTITUR FILED THIS CAUSE HAVING BEEN ARGUED AND SUBMITTED, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THERE IS AMPLE EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT THE JURY VERDICT ENTERED 6-9-98. FURTHERMORE, NOWHERE DOES THE RECORD SUGGEST THAT THE AMOUNT AWARDED BY THE JURY VIOLATES CIVIL CODE 3358. THEREFORE, THE ORDER GRANTING JUDGMENT NOTWITHSTANDING THE VERDICT IS REVERSED, AND THE CAUSE IS REMANDED WITH DIRECTION TO REINSTATE THE VERDICT.
